description: About the role. Example Impact Fund is hiring an Impact Investment Analyst to support diligence, portfolio monitoring, market research, and investment decision-making across climate resilience, financial inclusion, and community development investments. Key responsibilities include screening new opportunities, reviewing business plans, building and auditing financial models, analyzing operating and impact data, preparing investment committee materials, coordinating due diligence workstreams, documenting risks, and monitoring portfolio performance after investment. The analyst will conduct sector research, synthesize findings for senior team members, collaborate with external advisers and portfolio-company leaders, and improve internal tools used for pipeline management and impact measurement. Qualifications include experience in finance, consulting, investing, research, or another analytical environment; strong Excel and financial modeling skills; clear writing; careful judgment; attention to detail; and the ability to manage several projects at once. Experience using Python, SQL, data visualization, impact measurement frameworks, development finance, climate finance, or community investing is helpful. Candidates should be comfortable explaining complex analysis, asking thoughtful questions, working collaboratively, and learning unfamiliar sectors quickly. We value curiosity, integrity, initiative, inclusive teamwork, and a demonstrated commitment to mission-driven investing and measurable social outcomes.
